summary: Tested 6 assertions: all 6 passed. LuxAlgoMSSDetector correctly classifies BOS/CHoCH (VAL-LMSS-001), fires without displacement gate producing 46 unique detections on 5m that a8ra misses (VAL-LMSS-002), produces strictly more detections than a8ra on all 3 timeframes (VAL-LMSS-003), operates at both internal and swing structure levels (VAL-LMSS-004), tracks trend state correctly with CHoCH flipping and BOS keeping (VAL-LMSS-005), and all Detection objects follow the required schema (VAL-LMSS-006). Existing pytest suite (18 tests) passes cleanly.
